steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Select '0713.125150 acquirer for gateway' acquirer using filter
Type '0713.125150 acquirer for gateway' into 'Select acquirer' field

Click 'Delete business unit acquirer' for merchant acquirer with name: acquirer for gateway
Verify: Success deletion alert message is shown
